title: eriogonum clivosum
intro: Eriogonum clivosum, also known as rocky mountain buckwheat or alpine buckwheat, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Eriogonum clivosum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Eriogonum clivosum is often prepared as a tea or infusion for medicinal use, and it can also be dried and made into a powder or tincture for further herbal preparations.
